title: buglossoides arvensis subsp. incrassata
intro: Buglossoides arvensis subsp. incrassata, also known as blue bugloss or cornflower bugloss, is a perennial plant species within the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help reduce swelling and fight free radicals in the body. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. Buglossoides arvensis subsp. incrassata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its potential health benefits.
